text.title: Post-Handover Warranty Runbook Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce + maintain the runbook.

step.name: scaffold
step.action: Create runbook file from template; set owner + version + window.

step.name: populate
step.input: Skeleton + incident catalogue from prior project
step.action: Author phases + steps; attach precondition, actor, artefact, rollback.
step.decision-gate: Reject steps without rollback or STOP.

step.name: walk-test
step.action: Walk one engineer through; record gaps + ambiguity.
step.decision-gate: Reject if engineer cannot execute without asking for clarification.

step.name: publish
step.action: Commit to repo / wiki; announce to client in-house team.

step.name: review
step.input: Run records + outcome data per cycle
step.action: Re-validate against actual usage; bump version + last_reviewed.
step.decision-gate: Run staleness-check.py weekly; stale runbooks blocked from production.
